question:
Will Italy win on 2025-11-13?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 13, 2025
If Italy wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: fifa.com

evidences.title: World Cup qualifying: Udine to host Italy vs. Israel
evidences.content: Udine will host Italy vs. Israel in a 2026 World Cup qualifier in Group I. The article notes Udine previously hosted the same fixture in the UEFA Nations League and says Italy will resume their qualifying campaign later in the year.

evidences.title: Official: Spalletti confirms Italy squad for Germany Nations League quarter-finals - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: The winners will go on to compete in the Nations League finals, which will be held in either Germany or Italy. The winner of this tie will host the Nations League finals at the beginning of June. There are few surprises among Spalletti’s selections. There is no Federico Dimarco due to injury, which means there is a first call-up for Atalanta left wing-back Matteo Ruggeri, along with Tottenham’s Destiny Udogie, who is likely to start in Dimarco’s absence. Also earning a first call-up to the senior side is Torino midfielder Cesare Casadei, who has impressed in his first weeks of Serie A football after returning to Italy from Chelsea during the January transfer window.

evidences.title: When do Italy play next? Nations League and World Cup qualifiers - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: Italy will play either Germany, Spain or Portugal in the quarter-finals, and will learn their next opponents at the Nations League quarter-final draw on Friday. ## When do 2026 World Cup qualifiers start? Technically, the first set of European World Cup qualifiers will also begin in the March international break for teams who have been drawn into groups of five. As Italy will be in Nations League action in March, their World Cup qualifying campaign will instead begin in the September international break in 2025. There will then be more qualifiers in October and November, with the play-offs scheduled for March 2026. Download app from appStore Download app from googlePlay [...] Soccer image Soccer image ... We can add this result to the previous rating to get the new rating! `K` is known as the k-factor, or development coefficient (you can find its value in the calculator by selecting the “Adjust K-factors manually” checkbox). It usually takes values between `10` and `40`, depending on the player's strength (see the dedicated section below for more details). [...] The fastest way is to use our Elo calculator! evidences.title: 2025 Club World Cup preview: What to know about all 32 teams - ESPN
evidences.content: Fun fact you need to know: Juventus wear black and white as a nod to English fourth-tier club Notts County. Their first foreign player, Gordon Thomas Savage, took a bag full of County shirts to Italy in the early 1900s, which prompted a switch in color scheme. When Juve opened their new stadium in 2011, they invited Notts County to play the first official game there as a mark of respect. Our prediction: Group G is winnable, and should Juve do so, a clear path to the quarterfinals at least emerges. If they finish second, they risk running into Real Madrid in the round of 16. -- Sam Tighe ### Manchester City logoManchester City Manchester City logo Where they play: English Premier League How they qualified for Club World Cup: Winners of the 2022-23 UEFA Champions League [...] Our prediction: There will be no Hollywood ending. evidences.title: Gattuso's Italy Squad REVEALED for Northern Ireland | Kayode OUT
evidences.content: HAJJBALL reacts to Gennaro Gattuso’s latest Italy squad for the huge World Cup play-off semi-final against Northern Ireland on March 26, with all the pressure on the Azzurri as they fight to keep their 2026 World Cup hopes alive. In this video, HAJJBALL breaks down the biggest call-ups from Gattuso’s squad, including the return of Federico Chiesa and the first senior call-up for Marco Palestra, while also discussing some of the major omissions — especially Michael Kayode, whose absence will raise plenty of questions given Italy’s lack of depth at right-back. HAJJBALL also looks at what Gattuso may be thinking tactically, the balance of experience and youth in the squad, and gives a full predicted Italy starting XI for the must-win clash against Northern Ireland, with analysis on who [...] for him. "Oh, it's this. Oh, it's that." Barella has been piss-poor. But, listen, as well as it may sound, Barella will be a starter in the game against Northern Ireland. evidences.title: Football Predictions | Opta Analyst
evidences.content: Opta’s League Prediction model estimates the likelihood of teams finishing in each position in the competition. We can therefore see how successful a team’s season is likely to be, whether it’s their relegation or title chances. The model estimates the probability of each match outcome (win, draw or loss) by using betting market odds and the Opta Power Rankings. The odds and rankings are based on historical and recent team performances. The model considers the strength of opponents by using these match outcome probabilities and simulates the remaining fixtures in the competition thousands of times. By analysing the outcome of each of these simulations, the model can see how often teams finished in each league position to create our final predictions. [...] Football # Opta Football Predictions Your home for football predictions for various competitions in 2025-26 via the Opta supercomputer. The first section contains individual game-by-game predictions. Scroll down to see season-long predictions. ### How Does the Opta Supercomputer Model Work? Our upcoming match predictions give you win, draw, and loss probabilities for every game, so you can quickly spot where the favourites lie and where upsets might be brewing. These aren’t pulled from thin air. They come from our simulation model, which accounts for each team’s current strength rating, recent form, home advantage, and more. Italian football is famously tactical, and tight, cagey results are more common here than in most leagues, so you’ll often see draw probabilities higher than you might expect. That’s the model reflecting reality, not hedging its bets. evidences.title: When is the next Italy squad announcement? Everything you need to know - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: ## When is the next Italy squad announcement? Spalletti is due to reveal his Italy squad for the upcoming Nations League quarter-finals against Germany on Friday afternoon of March 14. UDINE, ITALY - OCTOBER 14: The Italian starting eleven gather in a huddle before kick off at the UEFA Nations League 2024/25 League A Group A2 match between Italy and Israel at Stadio Friuli on October 14, 2024 in Udine, Italy. (Photo by Timothy Rogers/Getty Images) ## When is Italy-Germany? The Nations League quarter-finals will be played over two legs during the March international break. The Azzurri will host Germany in San Siro first, on March 20 at 19.45 GMT. The return leg will be played at Signal Iduna Park in Dortmund a few days later on March 23. [...] ## Who will be in the next Italy squad? There aren’t expected to be too many major surprises in Spalletti’s upcoming squad. In fact, most of the squad is fairly predictable. Recent reports from La Gazzetta dello Sport claim that there are 18 players who are practically ‘guaranteed’ a spot in the team. epa11721406 Players of Italy pose for a family picture ahead of the UEFA Nations League soccer match between Belgium and Italy in Brussels, B...
